allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\2026\\ESTUDO_DE_IA\\Omie_V2" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.py','.json','.html','.js','.css' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, FullName | Select-Object -First 20 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/pagamentos/aymore/faixas" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $resp.Content } catch { "Servidor não está rodando ou erro: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\2026\\ESTUDO_DE_IA\\Omie_V2"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "main.py" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/pagamentos/aymore/faixas" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"valor_venda": 75000, "entrada": 0, "n_parcelas": 8, "carencia_dias": 30, "data_contrato": "2026-06-04"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/calcular_aymore" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "ok: $\($data.ok\), n_parcelas: $\($data.n_parcelas\), parcelas_count: $\($data.parcelas.Count\)" } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/projetos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).projetos | Select-Object -First 3 nome_safe, nome_projeto } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/projetos/Projeto_Marcelo_13" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $proj = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).projeto; "Nome: $\($proj.nome_projeto\)"; "Ambientes: $\($proj.ambientes.Count\)"; $proj.ambientes | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.arquivo\): selecionado=$\($_.selecionado\), total=$\($_.total\)" } } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"valor_venda": 129328.4, "entrada": 0, "n_parcelas": 8, "carencia_dias": 30, "data_contrato": "2026-06-04"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/calcular_aymore" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "ok=$\($data.ok\), taxa_ret=$\($data.taxa_retencao_pct\)%, liberado=R$$\($data.valor_liberado\), parcelas=$\($data.parcelas.Count\)"; $data.parcelas | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.tipo\) $\($_.num\): $\($_.data\) = R$$\($_.valor\)" } } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "E:\\2026\\ESTUDO_DE_IA\\Omie_V2"; $proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput ".\\server_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError ".\\server_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Content ".\\server_out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content ".\\server_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Servidor OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Servidor não respondeu" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/clientes" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/clientes -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"nome":"Ana Lima","cpf":"111.222.333-44","telefone":"\(12\) 98765-4321","whatsapp":"\(12\) 98765-4321","cep":"12242-800","logradouro":"Av Barão do Rio Branco","numero":"200","complemento":"Sala 5","bairro":"Jardim Esplanada","cidade":"São José dos Campos","estado":"SP","observacoes":"cliente verify test"}')
